name: mcp_list_orders
description: Proves the orders_db MCP server received a *filtered* list_orders call. Triggered by a realistic operator request that names neither the server nor the tool. Hard assertions: (a) the agent invoked `mcp__orders_db__list_orders`, (b) the call carried `status: "delivered"` (NOT just any list call), (c) the server-side result contained `AGB-EVAL-44` and `Grace Hopper`. `forbidden_tools: Read, Bash` rules out reading the source file as a substitute for protocol use.

turns.message: Pull up every delivered order for me - just the order IDs and tracking numbers please.
